headline_en: GoPro CEO Nicholas Woodman commits $20 million in personal financing as company explores sale
headline_zh: GoPro CEO伍德曼个人出资2000万美元为公司续命，出售评估仍在推进
blurb_en: GoPro's founder agreed to lend the company $20 million through senior secured notes at 6.5% interest with warrants for 25.7 million shares, providing a cash lifeline while the board continues evaluating a potential sale announced in May.
blurb_zh: GoPro创始人伍德曼同意以6.5%利率向公司提供2000万美元高级担保贷款及2570万股认股权证，为5月启动的出售评估争取时间。
verification_notes: Confirmed via GoPro official press release (PR Newswire, July 8), StockTitan SEC filing, Investing.com, Morningstar, TipRanks, and GuruFocus. $20M amount, 6.5% PIK rate, July 2028 maturity, $0.778 warrant exercise price, and third-lien security consistent across all sources. Strategic alternatives review announced May 11 still in progress.

headline_en: DJI and Insta360 drop US patent lawsuits and refile against each other in Chinese courts
headline_zh: 大疆和影石撤回美国专利诉讼后在中国多地法院互诉
blurb_en: Both companies voluntarily dismissed their Texas patent cases on June 28, then filed fresh suits in multiple Chinese courts — Insta360 launched six counterclaims and petitioned CNIPA to invalidate DJI patents, while DJI targets the Luna series in a Shenzhen hearing set for August 3.
blurb_zh: 双方于6月28日撤回德州专利案后在中国多地法院重新互诉，影石提起六项反诉并向国知局申请宣告大疆专利无效，大疆针对Luna系列的深圳中院案定于8月3日开庭。
verification_notes: Confirmed via DroneXL (July 4), DroneDJ (July 6), BigGo Finance, and VOI.id. June 28 voluntary dismissals without prejudice confirmed. Insta360 six counterclaims and CNIPA invalidation petition confirmed. DJI Shenzhen Intermediate People's Court hearing August 3 confirmed across sources.

headline_en: Insta360 X6 passes FCC certification, pointing to August or September launch
headline_zh: Insta360 X6通过FCC认证，预计8月或9月发布
blurb_en: The Insta360 X6 cleared FCC certification on July 3 under ID 2AWWH-CINSABXA with Wi-Fi and Bluetooth support, and leaks suggest the X5 successor will shoot 8K at 60fps in 360-degree mode with larger sensors for improved low-light performance.
blurb_zh: Insta360 X6于7月3日通过FCC认证（ID：2AWWH-CINSABXA），泄露信息显示这款X5继任者将支持360度8K 60fps拍摄，配备更大传感器以提升暗光表现。
verification_notes: FCC certification confirmed via Imaging Resource, Notebookcheck, Gizmochina (July 6), The New Camera, Photography Talk, and Geeky Gadgets. FCC ID 2AWWH-CINSABXA and July 3 grant date confirmed. 8K/60fps and larger sensors are unconfirmed leaks, not official specs.

headline_en: Peacock streams World Cup 2026 in Dolby Vision and Atmos, marking a first for live sports
headline_zh: Peacock以杜比视界和全景声直播2026世界杯，开创体育直播先河
blurb_en: Peacock is streaming all 104 World Cup matches in Dolby Vision HDR and Dolby Atmos with Dolby AC-4 — the first time live sports have been delivered in this format — after over a year of joint engineering between Dolby and NBCUniversal for native HDR production.
blurb_zh: Peacock以杜比视界HDR和杜比全景声直播全部104场世界杯比赛，这是体育赛事首次采用该格式，背后是杜比与NBC环球超过一年的原生HDR制作技术联合开发。
verification_notes: Confirmed via SVG (July 7), Dolby Newsroom (June 5), NBCUniversal, PR Newswire, Forbes (June 5), TV Technology, and CE Critic. Streaming first for Dolby Vision in live sports confirmed across all sources. Dolby AC-4 first commercial deployment by a video streamer also confirmed.

headline_en: TikTok Shop bans AI-generated voices and pre-recorded audio from shopping livestreams
headline_zh: TikTok电商禁止购物直播使用AI语音和预录音频
blurb_en: TikTok Shop now requires all verbal communication during promotional livestreams to happen in real time — AI-generated voices, pre-recorded narration, slideshows, and looping footage are banned, with violators facing commission cuts, content removal, and account suspension.
blurb_zh: TikTok电商要求所有促销直播中的语言交流必须实时进行，禁止使用AI语音、预录旁白、幻灯片和循环视频，违者将面临佣金限制、内容删除和账号封禁。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Social Media Today, PYMNTS, Netinfluencer, SwitcherStudio, ShopIFreaks, Crescitaly, and GlobalDatingInsights. Policy published in TikTok Shop's US Academy Prohibited Content section. Enforcement through Creator Health Rating system confirmed. EMARKETER finding that consumers are 4x more likely to trust brands less when they notice AI-generated marketing content cited by PYMNTS.

headline_en: Apple adds Clean HDMI Out to Final Cut Camera, exclusive to iPhone 17 Pro
headline_zh: 苹果为Final Cut Camera新增Clean HDMI输出功能，iPhone 17 Pro独占
blurb_en: Final Cut Camera 2.3 adds Clean HDMI Out on iPhone 17 Pro, letting creators send an overlay-free video feed via USB-C to external monitors or recorders, alongside tighter integration that imports footage directly into Final Cut Pro on Mac.
blurb_zh: Final Cut Camera 2.3为iPhone 17 Pro新增Clean HDMI输出，可通过USB-C向外接监视器或录制设备传输无叠加画面，同时支持直接向Mac上的Final Cut Pro导入素材。
verification_notes: Confirmed via 9to5Mac (July 1), AppleInsider (July 1), MacObserver, iDropNews, CDM, and My Mobile India. Clean HDMI Out exclusive to iPhone 17 Pro confirmed across all sources. Final Cut Camera version 2.3 and iOS 18.6 requirement confirmed. ProRes RAW and genlock also exclusive to iPhone 17 Pro.

headline_en: DJI's July 8 enterprise reveal is the AP100 parachute for Matrice 400, not a new drone
headline_zh: 大疆7月8日企业级新品揭晓：Matrice 400降落伞系统AP100，非新款无人机
blurb_en: The much-anticipated July 8 reveal behind DJI's "For the Priceless Below" teaser turned out to be the AP100 parachute — a 935g rear-mounted recovery system for the Matrice 400 that deploys in under 600ms and enables EASA C5/UK5 compliance for flights over populated areas.
blurb_zh: 大疆"为无价之物"预告的悬念揭晓，7月8日发布的是AP100降落伞——一款935g的Matrice 400后置回收系统，600毫秒内展开，使其满足EASA C5/UK5城区飞行安全要求。
verification_notes: Confirmed via DroneXL (July 8), DJI official announcement, Heliguy, Coptrz, TechNode (July 9), and DJI Enterprise Insights blog. 935g weight, sub-600ms deployment, sub-5m/s descent rate, independent power and flight control system confirmed across all sources. EASA C5 and UK CAA UK5 compliance confirmed.
